lessons.title: Finding the Entrance
lessons.goal: Communicate your arrival and navigate the intercom system.

sections.title: Learn the Words
sections.description: Essential words for arriving at the building.

sections.title: Build the Phrases
sections.description: Common phrases to use upon arrival.

sections.title: Practice the Dialogue
sections.description: Real conversations you might have at the intercom.

sections.title: Mastery Check
sections.description: Prove you are ready to open the door.

lessons.title: Keys and Codes
lessons.goal: Understand instructions for retrieving keys from a lockbox or hidden location.

sections.title: Learn the Words
sections.description: Essential words for finding the keys.

sections.title: Build the Phrases
sections.description: Phrases for codes and lockboxes.

sections.title: Practice the Dialogue
sections.description: Conversations about finding the keys.

sections.title: Mastery Check
sections.description: Prove you can retrieve the key.

lessons.title: Opening the Door
lessons.goal: Handle mechanical issues with old locks and heavy doors.

sections.title: Learn the Words
sections.description: Mechanical terms for doors and locks.

sections.title: Build the Phrases
sections.description: Phrases for operating the lock.

sections.title: Practice the Dialogue
sections.description: Discussions about tricky doors.

sections.title: Mastery Check
sections.description: Prove you can open the door.

lessons.title: Communicating Problems
lessons.goal: Report access issues and ask the host for physical assistance.

sections.title: Learn the Words
sections.description: Words to report problems and delays.

sections.title: Build the Phrases
sections.description: Phrases for asking for help.

sections.title: Practice the Dialogue
sections.description: Reporting issues to the host.

sections.title: Mastery Check
sections.description: Prove you can communicate an issue.

lessons.title: Finding the Way Inside
lessons.goal: Navigate the interior of an Italian apartment building.

sections.title: Learn the Words
sections.description: Words for building navigation.

sections.title: Build the Phrases
sections.description: Phrases about floors and elevators.

sections.title: Practice the Dialogue
sections.description: Following interior directions.

sections.title: Mastery Check

lessons.title: Settling In
lessons.goal: Understand house rules, adjust the heating, and connect to Wi-Fi.

sections.title: Learn the Words
